introSection: Tornado was a steel roller coaster located at Selva Mágica in Guadalajara, Jalisco, Mexico. It had previously been located at Busch Gardens: The Old Country and then La Feria Chapultepec Magico.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Blue track and orange supports. It used to feature yellow track and black supports before being repainted, with yellow track and blue supports at La Feria Chapultepec Magico and brown track and supports at Busch Gardens: The Old Country.

fullText:
Tornado was a steel roller coaster located at Selva Mágica in Guadalajara, Jalisco, Mexico. It had previously been located at Busch Gardens: The Old Country and then La Feria Chapultepec Magico.



Blue track and orange supports. It used to feature yellow track and black supports before being repainted, with yellow track and blue supports at La Feria Chapultepec Magico and brown track and supports at Busch Gardens: The Old Country.
